text: I want to help, but I'm missing the context to know what "this" refers to — I don't have a child scoped in right now, and I can't see event or symptom details on my own. Could you tell me which child you're asking about and what's going on (something behavioral, a sleep pattern, a physical symptom, etc.)? That'll help me point you to the right guidance — and if it sounds medical in nature, I'll likely suggest checking with your pediatric office alongside whatever I can share.
